content: Be fearful when others are greedy, and greedy when others are fearful.
author: Warren Buffett

content: Rule No. 1: Never lose money. Rule No. 2: Never forget Rule No. 1.
author: Warren Buffett

content: If you aren't willing to own a stock for ten years, don't even think about owning it for ten minutes.
author: Warren Buffett

content: Price is what you pay. Value is what you get.
author: Warren Buffett

content: Risk comes from not knowing what you are doing.
author: Warren Buffett

content: When the tide goes out, we get to see who's been swimming naked.
author: Warren Buffett

content: The best way to own stocks is to hold them forever.
author: Warren Buffett

content: Find outstanding companies and hold them for the long term.
author: Warren Buffett

content: A great business at a fair price is better than a fair business at a great price.
author: Warren Buffett

content: It's far better to be approximately right than precisely wrong.
author: Warren Buffett

content: Be greedy when others are fearful, and fearful when others are greedy.
author: Warren Buffett

content: Investing requires no high IQ, but high emotional intelligence.
author: Warren Buffett

content: Patience is the most important quality for an investor.
author: Warren Buffett

content: Time is the friend of wonderful businesses and the enemy of mediocre ones.
author: Warren Buffett

content: Less is more. Concentration beats diversification in generating returns.
author: Warren Buffett

content: Diversification is protection against ignorance.
author: Warren Buffett

content: If I don't find sufficiently good investment opportunities, I do nothing.
author: Warren Buffett

content: Don't put all your eggs in one basket.
author: Warren Buffett

content: Knowing what you don't know is more important than knowing what you do know.
author: Warren Buffett

content: In the short run, the market is a voting machine. In the long run, it's a weighing machine.
author: Benjamin Graham

content: An investment operation is one which, upon thorough analysis, promises safety of principal and an adequate return.
author: Benjamin Graham

content: Don't argue with Mr. Market.
author: Benjamin Graham

content: The investor's chief problem—and even his worst enemy—is likely to be himself.
author: Benjamin Graham

content: Margin of safety is the central concept of investment.
author: Benjamin Graham

content: The true investor welcomes volatility because it creates opportunities.
author: Benjamin Graham

content: It is impossible to produce superior performance unless you do something different from the majority.
author: George Soros

content: The economic history of the world is a series of dramas based on illusions and lies.
author: George Soros

content: I only invest when I have an edge.
author: George Soros

content: Every bubble has two components: the underlying trend and the misconception about it.
author: George Soros

content: Markets are constantly in a state of uncertainty and flux, and money is made by discounting future developments.
author: George Soros

content: When I feel that I'm right, I bet heavily. When I'm uncertain, I bet less aggressively.
author: George Soros

content: It is not whether you're right or wrong that matters, but how much money you make when you're right and how much you lose when you're wrong.
author: George Soros

content: The business schools reward complex behavior more than simple behavior, but simple behavior is more effective.
author: Charlie Munger

content: In the world of business, the people who are most successful are those who are always thinking about what could go wrong.
author: Charlie Munger

content: All I want to know is where I'm going to die so I'll never go there.
author: Charlie Munger

content: The first rule of compounding: Never interrupt it unnecessarily.
author: Charlie Munger

content: Spend each day trying to be a little wiser than you were when you woke up.
author: Charlie Munger

content: The higher your rate of savings, the higher your rate of wealth accumulation.
author: Charlie Munger

content: It's not how much you make, but how much you keep that matters.
author: Charlie Munger

content: Knowing what you don't know is more useful than being brilliant.
author: Charlie Munger

content: A lot of people with high IQs are terrible investors because they've got terrible temperaments.
author: Charlie Munger

content: You need to have a certain kind of temperament, not be crazed by volatility.
author: Charlie Munger

content: The idea of excessive diversification is madness.
author: Charlie Munger

content: Be patient. The big money is not in the buying and selling, but in the waiting.
author: Charlie Munger

content: Never lose money. Never forget never.
author: Charlie Munger

content: The most important lesson in investing is to not do stupid things.
author: Charlie Munger

content: Think about the downside first. The upside takes care of itself.
author: Charlie Munger

content: We have three baskets: yes, no, and too hard. Put things in the right basket.
author: Charlie Munger

content: The people who are most likely to succeed are those with a specific, well-defined purpose.
author: Peter Lynch

content: Know what you own, and know why you own it.
author: Peter Lynch

content: Never invest in a company that you don't understand.
author: Peter Lynch

content: If you can't find any flaws in the business, the odds are you're not looking hard enough.
author: Peter Lynch

content: The stock market is filled with individuals who know the price of everything, but the value of nothing.
author: Peter Lynch

content: Buying stocks without thorough research is as dangerous as driving while intoxicated.
author: Peter Lynch

content: The real money in investing will come from finding and owning great businesses for the long term.
author: Peter Lynch

content: Go for a business that any idiot could run, because sooner or later, any idiot probably is going to run it.
author: Peter Lynch

content: Your investor's edge is not intelligence; it's a different way of thinking that makes you see things that others miss.
author: Peter Lynch

content: The bigger the potential return, the bigger the potential loss.
author: Peter Lynch

content: Never invest based on a stock's price action.
author: Peter Lynch

content: If you're a long-term investor, market downturns are opportunities to buy more.
author: Peter Lynch

content: Time is your friend, impulse is your enemy.
author: John Bogle

content: Don't do something, just stand there.
author: John Bogle

content: The simplest way to get market returns is to stop trading.
author: John Bogle

content: In investing, costs matter. Always.
author: John Bogle

content: Low cost investing is the most reliable path to investment success.
author: John Bogle

content: The market is a device for transferring money from the impatient to the patient.
author: John Bogle

content: How you behave is more important than what you know.
author: John Bogle

content: Don't mistake a bull market for brains.
author: John Bogle

content: The secret to success is to do nothing.
author: John Bogle

content: The three most important words in investing: diversification, simplicity, and low cost.
author: John Bogle

content: The power of compounding has always been more compelling than the power of speculating.
author: John Bogle

content: The least expensive investment is to simply own the market.
author: John Bogle

content: In the long term, the stock market is a weighing machine.
author: John Bogle

content: Capital preservation is the first rule of investing.
author: Seth Klarman

content: The most common cause of low returns is high fees.
author: Seth Klarman

content: The market is a pendulum that forever swings between unsustainable optimism and unjustified pessimism.
author: Seth Klarman

content: Value investing is a long-term strategy. The real gains come from compounding over decades.
author: Seth Klarman

content: The best way to reduce portfolio volatility is to diversify across uncorrelated assets.
author: Ray Dalio

content: The economy works like a machine. Understanding how it works is the key to investing success.
author: Ray Dalio

content: Most people have the tendency to extrapolate recent trends into the future.
author: Ray Dalio

content: The most important driver of returns is how assets are balanced.
author: Ray Dalio

content: The all-weather portfolio is designed to perform well in all economic environments.
author: Ray Dalio

content: Risk means being wrong, not just losing money.
author: Ray Dalio

content: You have the assets, you have the cash, your emotions have the cash too.
author: Howard Marks

content: The worst thing is when your winning investment makes you sell it prematurely.
author: Howard Marks

content: What distinguishes great investors from poor ones is their ability to stay calm under pressure.
author: Howard Marks

content: The biggest risk is not taking any risk.
author: Howard Marks

content: The risk of losing money is the only thing I worry about.
author: Howard Marks

content: Cut your losses short and let your profits run.
author: Wall Street Proverb

content: Never risk more than 1-2% of your portfolio on a single trade.
author: Risk Management Rule

content: The trend is your friend until it ends.
author: Wall Street Proverb

content: Bulls make money, bears make money, pigs get slaughtered.
author: Wall Street Proverb

content: Buy the rumor, sell the news.
author: Wall Street Proverb

content: The market can remain irrational longer than you can remain solvent.
author: John Maynard Keynes

content: When the facts change, I change my mind. What do you do, sir?
author: John Maynard Keynes

content: The difficulty lies not in the new ideas but in escaping the old ones.
author: John Maynard Keynes

content: The most powerful force in the universe is compound interest.
author: Albert Einstein

content: Compound interest is the eighth wonder of the world. He who understands it, earns it.
author: Albert Einstein

content: Those who understand compound interest are destined to collect it. Those who don't are destined to pay it.
author: Albert Einstein

content: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
author: Benjamin Franklin

content: The three essential virtues of a businessman: punctuality, industry, and frugality.
author: Benjamin Franklin

content: Time is money.
author: Benjamin Franklin

content: A penny saved is a penny earned.
author: Benjamin Franklin

content: The way to wealth is depends on two words: industry and frugality.
author: Benjamin Franklin

content: Rather go to bed without dinner than to rise in debt.
author: Benjamin Franklin

content: If you would know the value of money, go and try to borrow some.
author: Benjamin Franklin

content: Money has never made a man happy, nor will it. There is nothing in its nature to produce happiness.
author: Benjamin Franklin

content: The real measure of our wealth is how much we'd be worth if we lost all our money.
author: John Henry Jakes

content: The only thing I know is that I know nothing.
author: Socrates

content: Strong minds discuss ideas, average minds discuss events, weak minds discuss people.
author: Socrates

content: The secret of change is to focus all of your energy not on fighting the old, but on building the new.
author: Socrates

content: Education is the kindling of a flame, not the filling of a vessel.
author: Socrates

content: He is richest who is content with the least, for content is the wealth of nature.
author: Socrates

content: The beginning of wisdom is the most sincere desire to know.
author: Socrates

content: To find yourself, think for yourself.
author: Socrates

content: True wisdom comes to each of us when we realize how little we understand about life, ourselves, and the world around us.
author: Socrates

content: The foundation of every state is the education of its youth.
author: Diogenes

content: We have two ears and one mouth so that we can listen twice as much as we speak.
author: Epictetus

content: It is impossible to begin to learn that which one thinks one already knows.
author: Epictetus

content: Wealth is not his that has it, but his that enjoys it.
author: Epictetus

content: If you want to be happy, be.
author: Epictetus

content: Make the best use of what is in your power, and take the rest as it happens.
author: Epictetus

content: Any person capable of angering you becomes your master.
author: Epictetus

content: Man is not worried by real problems so much as by his imagined anxieties about real problems.
author: Epictetus

content: It's not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.
author: Epictetus

content: The key is to keep company only with people who uplift you.
author: Epictetus

content: Don't explain your philosophy. Embody it.
author: Epictetus

content: Freedom is the only worthy goal in life.
author: Epictetus

content: He is a wise man who does not grieve for the things which he has not, but rejoices for those which he has.
author: Epictetus

content: No great thing is created suddenly.
author: Epictetus

content: Only the educated are free.
author: Epictetus

content: How much more grievous are the consequences of anger than the consequences of the cause of it.
author: Marcus Aurelius

content: The soul becomes dyed with the color of its thoughts.
author: Marcus Aurelius

content: Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.
author: Marcus Aurelius

content: You have power over your mind - not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
author: Marcus Aurelius

content: The happiness of your life depends upon the quality of your thoughts.
author: Marcus Aurelius

content: Very little is needed to make a happy life; it is all within yourself, in your way of thinking.
author: Marcus Aurelius

content: The best revenge is not to be like your enemy.
author: Marcus Aurelius

content: If it is not right, do not do it; if it is not true, do not say it.
author: Marcus Aurelius

content: Accept the things to which fate binds you, and love the people with whom fate brings you together.
author: Marcus Aurelius

content: Never let the future disturb you.
author: Marcus Aurelius

content: When you arise in the morning, think of what a precious privilege it is to be alive.
author: Marcus Aurelius

content: A man's worth is no greater than his ambitions.
author: Marcus Aurelius

content: It is not because things are difficult that we do not dare; it is because we do not dare that things are difficult.
author: Seneca

content: Difficulties strengthen the mind, as labor does the body.
author: Seneca

content: As is a tale, so is life: not how long it is, but how good it is, is what matters.
author: Seneca

content: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
author: Seneca

content: It is quality rather than quantity that matters.
author: Seneca

content: True happiness is to enjoy the present, without anxious dependence upon the future.
author: Seneca

content: No person has the power to have everything they want, but it is in their power not to want what they don't have.
author: Seneca

content: Every new beginning comes from some other beginning's end.
author: Seneca

content: It is not that we have a short time to live, but that we waste a lot of it.
author: Seneca

content: Hang on to your youthful enthusiasms – you'll be able to use them better when you're older.
author: Seneca

content: The sun also shines on the wicked.
author: Seneca

content: Expecting is the greatest impediment to living. In order to be free, we must expect nothing.
author: Seneca

content: Sometimes even to live is an act of courage.
author: Seneca

content: Life is like a play: it's not the length, but the excellence of the acting that matters.
author: Seneca

content: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
author: Seneca

content: Most powerful is he who has himself in his own power.
author: Seneca

content: Anger, if not restrained, is frequently more hurtful to us than the injury that provokes it.
author: Seneca

content: We are more often frightened than hurt; and we suffer more from imagination than from reality.
author: Seneca

content: Religion is regarded by the common people as true, by the wise as false, and by rulers as useful.
author: Seneca

content: Wherever there is a human being, there is an opportunity for kindness.
author: Seneca

content: One of the most beautiful qualities of true friendship is to understand and to be understood.
author: Seneca

content: If a man does not know to what port he is sailing, no wind is favorable.
author: Seneca

content: The greatest remedy for anger is delay.
author: Seneca

content: It is the power of the mind to be unconquerable.
author: Seneca

content: We learn not in the school, but in life.
author: Seneca

content: You act like mortals in all that you fear, and like immortals in all that you desire.
author: Seneca

content: While we are postponing, life speeds by.
author: Seneca

content: Every guilty person is his own hangman.
author: Seneca

content: What injures the hive injures the bee.
author: Seneca

content: It is the undue fear of death that makes you eager to prolong your life.
author: Seneca

content: Nothing is more honorable than a grateful heart.
author: Seneca

content: No man is good by chance. Goodness is the result of will.
author: Seneca

content: All cruelty springs from weakness.
author: Seneca

content: Fate leads the willing, and drags along the reluctant.
author: Seneca

content: No one can hurt you without your consent.
author: Seneca

content: Not what we have but what we enjoy, constitutes our abundance.
author: Seneca

content: In the depth of winter, I finally learned that within me there lay an invincible summer.
author: Albert Camus

content: The only way to deal with an unfree world is to become so absolutely free that your very existence is an act of rebellion.
author: Albert Camus

content: Man is the only creature who refuses to be what he is.
author: Albert Camus

content: Don't walk in front of me, I may not follow. Don't walk behind me, I may not lead. Walk beside me and be my friend.
author: Albert Camus

content: I rebel; therefore I exist.
author: Albert Camus

content: Freedom is nothing but a chance to be better.
author: Albert Camus

content: Live to the point of tears.
author: Albert Camus

content: I know of only one duty, and that is to love.
author: Albert Camus

content: You will never be happy if you continue to search for what happiness consists of.
author: Albert Camus

content: Real generosity toward the future lies in giving all to the present.
author: Albert Camus

content: One must imagine Sisyphus happy.
author: Albert Camus

content: The struggle itself toward the heights is enough to fill a man's heart. One must imagine Sisyphus happy.
author: Albert Camus

content: In the midst of winter, I found there was, within me, an invincible summer.
author: Albert Camus

content: Without work, all life goes rotten.
author: Albert Camus

content: A man without ethics is a wild beast loosed upon this world.
author: Albert Camus

content: I have been and am a seeker, but I have never been able to find an answer.
author: Albert Camus

content: Life is the sum of all your choices.
author: Albert Camus

content: Charm is a way of getting the answer without asking a question.
author: Albert Camus

content: I feel lonely when I am with people who don't understand me. I feel lonely when I am with people who do.
author: Albert Camus

content: There is no love of life without despair of life.
author: Albert Camus

content: To be happy, we must be aware that we are happy.
author: Albert Camus

content: Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance you must keep moving.
author: Albert Einstein

content: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
author: Albert Einstein

content: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

content: The true sign of intelligence is not knowledge but imagination.
author: Albert Einstein

content: We cannot solve our problems with the same thinking we used when we created them.
author: Albert Einstein

content: Logic will get you from A to B. Imagination will take you everywhere.
author: Albert Einstein

content: Try not to become a man of success. Rather become a man of value.
author: Albert Einstein

content: Once you stop learning, you start dying.
author: Albert Einstein

content: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
author: Albert Einstein

content: I have no special talent. I am only passionately curious.
author: Albert Einstein

content: Curiosity is more important than knowledge.
author: Albert Einstein

content: The measure of intelligence is the ability to change.
author: Albert Einstein

content: The only source of knowledge is experience.
author: Albert Einstein

content: Everything should be made as simple as possible, but not simpler.
author: Albert Einstein

content: Education is what remains after one has forgotten what one has learned in school.
author: Albert Einstein

content: The difference between genius and stupidity is that genius has its limits.
author: Albert Einstein

content: The world is a dangerous place to live; not because of the people who are evil, but because of the people who don't act.
author: Albert Einstein

content: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
author: Steve Jobs

content: Your time is limited, don't waste it living someone else's life.
author: Steve Jobs

content: The people who are crazy enough to think they can change the world, are the ones who do.
author: Steve Jobs

content: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
author: Steve Jobs

content: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.
author: Steve Jobs

content: Sometimes when you innovate, you're making mistakes. It is best to admit them quickly.
author: Steve Jobs

content: Twenty years from now you will be more disappointed by the things you didn't do than by the ones you did.
author: Mark Twain

content: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

content: Kindness is the language which the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
author: Mark Twain

content: The two most important days in your life are the day you are born and the day you find out why.
author: Mark Twain

content: Whenever you find yourself on the side of the majority, it is time to pause and reflect.
author: Mark Twain

content: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: Nelson Mandela

content: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

content: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
author: Nelson Mandela

content: I learned that courage was not the absence of fear, but the triumph over it.
author: Nelson Mandela

content: I never lose. I either win or learn.
author: Nelson Mandela

content: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: Lao Tzu

content: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
author: Lao Tzu

content: He who knows others is wise; he who knows himself is enlightened.
author: Lao Tzu

content: When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.
author: Lao Tzu

content: Knowing others is intelligence; knowing yourself is true wisdom.
author: Lao Tzu

content: When you are content to be simply yourself and don't compete or stun, the whole world will belong to you.
author: Lao Tzu

content: To attain knowledge, add things every day. To attain wisdom, remove things every day.
author: Lao Tzu

content: The only journey is the one within.
author: Rainer Maria Rilke

content: Live the questions now.
author: Rainer Maria Rilke

content: Be patient toward all that is unsolved in your heart and try to love the questions themselves.
author: Rainer Maria Rilke

content: The future enters into us, in order to be transformed in us, long before it happens.
author: Rainer Maria Rilke

content: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

content: The purpose of life is not to be happy. It is to be useful, to be honorable, to be compassionate.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

content: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

content: Not all those who wander are lost.
author: J.R.R. Tolkien

content: All that is gold does not glitter, not all those who wander are lost.
author: J.R.R. Tolkien

content: We are at the very beginning of time for the human race.
author: Carl Sagan

content: The cosmos is within us. We are made of star-stuff.
author: Carl Sagan

content: Somewhere, something incredible is waiting to be known.
author: Carl Sagan

content: For small creatures such as we, the vastness is bearable only through love.
author: Carl Sagan

content: I would rather die of passion than of boredom.
author: Vincent van Gogh

content: If you hear a voice within you say 'you cannot paint,' then by all means paint, and that voice will be silenced.
author: Vincent van Gogh

content: I dream my painting, and then I paint my dream.
author: Vincent van Gogh

content: Great things are done by a series of small things brought together.
author: Vincent van Gogh

content: Be clearly aware of the stars and infinity on high. Then life seems almost enchanted after all.
author: Vincent van Gogh

content: If you want something, work for it.
author: Vincent van Gogh

content: I put my heart and my soul into my work, and have lost my mind in the process.
author: Vincent van Gogh

content: There is nothing more truly artistic than to love people.
author: Vincent van Gogh

content: I am always doing what I cannot do yet, in order to learn how to do it.
author: Vincent van Gogh

content: If you truly love nature, you will find beauty everywhere.
author: Vincent van Gogh

content: I can do nothing but paint, and therefore I shall paint with all my might.
author: Vincent van Gogh

content: Only think of what joy there is in living.
author: Vincent van Gogh

content: There is only one happiness in life, to love and be loved.
author: George Sand

content: Try to be happy in whatever situation you may find yourself.
author: George Sand

content: To be, or not to be, that is the question.
author: William Shakespeare

content: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: Oscar Wilde

content: Two roads diverged in a wood, and I took the one less traveled by.
author: Robert Frost
